content:
type: STATUS
files: outlines/prompts.py
summary: Implemented global _FILTERS registry + register_filter()/unregister_filter(); applied env.filters.update(_FILTERS) in _template_from_str and _template_from_file, before builtin filters are set so builtins always win. Saw your INTENT for filters param + create_jinja_env() helper - these are complementary (my global registry vs your per-call local filters). Please have your create_jinja_env(name, filters) apply builtins last so they always take priority, and merge order should be: global _FILTERS first, then local  param, then builtins overwrite. I'll adapt my registry code to slot into your helper once it lands - ping me when ready so we don't clobber each other.
